commit.message:
Fix preview continuo: use track's own preview URL first

Was always searching iTunes (fails for most Latin/EDM tracks).
Now uses sample_url (Beatport) or preview_url (Spotify) directly,
only falls back to iTunes if track has no preview URL.
Also clears timeout on natural track end to prevent double-advance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix client-side caching of empty property details

fetchPropertyDetails was caching ALL API responses in detailsCacheRef,
including empty results (no photos, no description). Once cached, those
zpids never re-fetched — so photos/descriptions stayed missing forever.

Now only caches results that have actual content. Empty results get
stored in state (so the UI updates) but not in the ref cache, so
they'll be re-fetched on next access when the API has real data.

'none' mode skips threshold entirely (monitoring only).

commit.message:
Fix propertydetails caching empty results for 24h

The Vercel CDN (s-maxage=86400) and in-memory cache were both storing
empty photo/description results from failed or rate-limited API calls.
Subsequent requests got the cached empty data instead of re-fetching.

Now: only cache results that have actual content (photos or description).
Empty results get no-store CDN header and are cleared from in-memory
cache on next request. Also adds ?fresh=1 param to bypass cache.

commit.message:
Generalize build: source-neutral ontology construction with modular Explorer

- Rename buildfromcode → build (command, process, all references)
- Redesign certainty as 2-layer: Explorer (observed/pending) → verification agents (rationale-absent/inferred/not-in-source)
- Add downstream consumption rules for every certainty grade
- Redefine Explorer role: structural recognition allowed, ontological interpretation prohibited
- Modularize Explorer profiles: explorers/{code,spreadsheet,database,document}.md
- Add Philosopher build-mode prompt with patch/convergence formats
- Add certainty demotion path (inferred → pending on refutation)
- Add abduction_quality self-assessment for inferred judgments
- Add source type detection + tool availability check in Phase 0.5
- Add change propagation checklist at end of build.md
- Rename rationale: → justification: to resolve homonym with rationale-absent
- Synchronize terminology across README.md, BLUEPRINT.md, process.md
- E2E verified: Round 0→1 loop, patch, convergence, certainty refinement all PASS

Add GitHub Action for CI/CD dependency scanning

Usage in workflows:
  - uses: SatishoBananamoto/vigil@main
    with:
      file: pyproject.toml
      fail-on: high

Features:
- Scans dependency files on push/PR
- Configurable fail threshold (critical/high/moderate/low)
- Posts markdown report as PR comment
- Supports cascade (transitive) analysis
- Uses repo's GITHUB_TOKEN for API access

Add per-zip fetch for Live mode active listings

Same pattern as Free Play: when a neighborhood has fewer than 5
active listings in the city-wide pool, Live mode now makes a
targeted API call for that zip (e.g. /api/pricepoint?zip=94122).
New active listings are deduped and merged into the main pool.

This fixes "No active listings" showing for neighborhoods like
Sunset where the city-wide search returned zero active properties
for that specific zip code.

commit.message:
Add 'View Full Listing on Zillow' link to Live mode

Shows a subtle link button between the list price and the prediction
input, so users can research the property before making their guess.
Opens in a new tab (target=_blank). Uses the detailUrl field from
the Zillow API which is already in the listing data.

Only shown in Live mode (showZillowLink prop) — Free Play and Daily
don't get it since those are sold comps where the answer is known.
Live mode is about informed predictions, so more research = better
pricing intuition.

Styled as a borderless card-style link with external-link icon.
Hover highlights the border in the mode's accent color.

- Start Ride: navigation icon header

- Map overlay buttons use mapOverlayBg
- update_bike bidirectional matching + garage refresh
- Shared MAP_STYLE_URLS constant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix active listings in Free Play + restore MLS description prefetch

Two fixes:

1. Verified sold filter: Added isVerifiedSold() helper that requires
   soldPrice + status=sold + soldDate. The Zillow "recentlySold" API
   sometimes returns active/for-sale listings (like the 47th Ave
   multi-family that's $1.45M and actively listed). Without a soldDate,
   these now get filtered out of Free Play. They'll still appear in
   Live mode where they belong.

2. Description prefetch timing: enterFreePlay is async (per-zip fetch),
   which can cause a race with the useEffect that triggers property
   details prefetch. Added a belt-and-suspenders setTimeout to manually
   kick off fetchPropertyDetails for the first 3 listings right after
   setting state. This ensures MLS descriptions load even if the
   useEffect fires before state has settled.

fix: render pipeline falls back to default ledger when named ledger missing (#7)

Wire registry_path into RenderEngine at all four CLI call sites (cmd_render,
cmd_render_dump_context, cmd_transition, cmd_event). Replace the hard-error in
resolve_render_ledger with graceful fallback to the default ledger when the
registry or named ledger is absent, emitting a stderr warning instead of
aborting the render. Adds integration test to cover the fallback path.

- DocumentsSection: delete button 36→48px
- PhotoSection: thumbnail delete button 32→44px
- Add decks_patios to every JOB_TYPES array and TYPE_LABEL map (EditJobForm, TemplateForm, TemplatesClient, OnboardingFlow, PortfolioClient, ProfitClient, SignaturePage, TypeTags)

Fix notification timezone bug, use Sri Lanka time for prayer matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: stabilize seed/backfill scripts for production execution

- Fix HAVING clause error in kyoninka backfill (use WHERE subquery)
- Add organizations/organization_name_variants CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS
  to all backfill and ingest scripts for direct DB access safety
- Add administrative_actions table init to ingest script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite expanding ring to use TickCore instead of world timers

- Replaced world timer approach with direct TickCore state tracking
- Uses RingState class with origin position, elapsed time, hit set
- TickCore checks every tick (same rate as entity updates) for accurate
  ring position, instead of timer callbacks that may drift
- Damage still only on ring band (ringInner to ringOuter)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Per-zip fetch for thin neighborhoods + filter active listings from Free Play

Two fixes:

1. Per-zip API fetch: When a neighborhood has fewer than 15 sold
   listings in the pool, enterFreePlay now makes a targeted API call
   for that specific zip code (e.g. /api/pricepoint?zip=94122 for
   Sunset). New listings are deduped by zpid and merged into the
   main soldListings pool. This gives each neighborhood 30-50+
   properties instead of the 1-8 they got from the city-wide search.

2. Free Play sold-only filter: Pool now requires both soldPrice AND
   status === "sold" to be included. This prevents active/pending
   listings from leaking into Free Play — those belong in Live mode
   only. The Zillow "recentlySold" API sometimes returns listings
   without actual sold prices (withdrawn, pending, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add skill planner, fittings, blueprints, mining, manufacturing calculator, compression calculator, wallet journal, mail reader, notifications, and page consolidation

New features:
- Skill planner with attribute remap optimizer and what-if simulator
- Ship fitting viewer with slot display and EFT export
- Blueprint library for characters and corporations (ME/TE, BPO/BPC filters)
- Mining ledger with ore/system/daily breakdown (character + corp aggregated)
- Full wallet journal with category filtering and entity name resolution (character + corp)
- Mail reader with body fetching and sender resolution
- Notification feed with parsed types and summaries
- Manufacturing calculator with nested build/buy, ME/TE/structure/rig modifiers, build time estimates (parallel/sequential), shopping list with multibuy copy
- Compression calculator with scipy LP solver, 3 optimization modes (ISK/Volume/Waste), character skill integration, trade hub selection
- Online status indicator (green/grey dots on character cards)

Page consolidation:
- Merged Characters page into Dashboard (grouping, sorting, drag-and-drop)
- Merged Overview page into Dashboard (wealth breakdown)
- Removed standalone Characters and Overview pages

Infrastructure:
- Extended SDE with typeMaterials (reprocessing yields), compressibleTypes, blueprintInfo (manufacturing times)
- Added scipy for linear programming solver
- Added 6 new ESI scopes (online, fittings, blueprints, mining)
- localStorage persistence for calculator state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Phase 10 Marketplace & Sharing - templates, import/export, reviews

- 2 new tables: marketplace_templates, template_reviews with RLS
- Export family economy as shareable template
- Import templates to create full economy (actions, rewards, streaks, bonuses, challenges)
- Community browsing with search, tag filters, age range
- Star ratings and reviews
- Publish/unpublish flow for template authors
- 261 unit tests passing across 12 test files
- ALL 10 PHASES COMPLETE

fix: interpolate transition CLI args as template variables in gate commands (#6)

Parse key=value args passed to StateMachine::transition() and merge them
into state_params before gate evaluation; CLI args override config-derived
params, so runtime values like item_id=BH-019 are available as {{item_id}}
inside gate command templates.

fix: 審查回饋修正 — questmap Options toggle、keywords type guard、Profiler 噪音

- Options 加入 questmap skin toggle（order 24）+ skinQuestMap locale key
  （前一 commit 只加了 default key 但遺漏 UI 控制）
- keywords get 加 type(kw) ~= "table" 防護（防止舊版 DB 存非 table 值）
- Profiler 導出 _eventProfilingEnabled flag，OnDisable 只在 profiling
  啟動時才呼叫 DisableEventProfiling（避免每次 /lunar off 印噪音訊息）

驗證：910 tests / 0 failures / 0 luacheck warnings / stylua clean
